After some "adventures" they finally get to Aspen where, using the lost money they live it up and fight for Mary's heart.

title: Eat Drink Man Woman (Yin shi nan nu) (1994)
cast: Lung Sihung Yang Kuei-mei Jacklyn Wu Chien-Lien Wang Yu-wen Sylvia Chang
overview: Retired and widowed Chinese master chef Chu lives in modern day Taipei, with his three attractive daughters, all of whom are unattached. Soon, each daughter encounters a new man in their lives. When these new relationships blossom, stereotypes are broken and the living situation within the family changes.

title: Exotica (1994)
cast: Bruce Greenwood Mia Kirshner Don McKellar Sarah Polley Victor Garber
overview: In the upscale Toronto strip club Exotica, dancer Christina is visited nightly by the obsessive Francis, a depressed tax auditor. Her ex-boyfriend, the club's MC, Eric, still jealously pines for her even as he introduces her onstage, but Eric is having his own relationship problems with the club's female owner. Thomas, a mysterious pet-shop owner, is about to become unexpectedly involved in their lives.

title: Exit to Eden (1994)
cast: Dana Delany Paul Mercurio Rosie O'Donnell Dan Aykroyd Héctor Elizondo
overview: Photographer Elliot Slater has inadvertently snapped the only existing photos of elusive jewel thief Omar. When Elliot leaves for a private vacation on an S&M island, he is followed by Omar, Omar's partner, Nina, and undercover police officers Fred and Sheila. Unaware of the number of people chasing him, Elliot enjoys his stay at the resort, and finds himself falling in love with head dominatrix Lisa.

title: Ed Wood (1994)
cast: Johnny Depp Martin Landau Sarah Jessica Parker Patricia Arquette Jeffrey Jones
overview: The mostly true story of the legendary "worst director of all time", who, with the help of his strange friends, filmed countless B-movies without ever becoming famous or successful.

title: French Kiss (1995)
cast: Meg Ryan Kevin Kline Timothy Hutton Jean Reno François Cluzet
overview: After her fiancee admits to infidelity while on a business trip in France, a woman attempts to get her lover back and marry him by traveling to Paris despite her crippling fear of flying.  On the way she unwittingly smuggles something of value that has a charming crook chasing her across France as she chases after her future husband.

title: Forget Paris (1995)
cast: Billy Crystal Debra Winger Joe Mantegna Cynthia Stevenson Richard Masur
overview: Mickey Gordon is a basketball referee who travels to France to bury his father. Ellen Andrews is an American living in Paris who works for the airline he flies on. They meet and fall in love, but their relationship goes through many difficult patches.

title: Far From Home: The Adventures of Yellow Dog (1995)
cast: Mimi Rogers Jesse Bradford Bruce Davison Tom Bower Joel Palmer
overview: Teenager Angus adopts a stray dog and names him Yellow. Several days later, while travelling along the coast of British Columbia with Angus's father, John, the boy and dog become stranded when turbulent waters capsize their boat. Angus's parents relentlessly badger rescue teams. Angus, schooled by his father in wilderness survival skills, and assisted by the intelligent Yellow Dog, tries to attract rescuers.

title: Goofy Movie, A (1995)
cast: Bill Farmer Jason Marsden Rob Paulsen Jim Cummings Kellie Martin
overview: Goofy’s teenage son Max is desperate to impress his crush and fit in at school. After well-meaning but ignorant Goofy suddenly whisks him away on a cross-country road trip—messing up Max’s first date plans in the process—Goofy’s old-school parenting and Max’s desire for independence lead to a vacation of hilarious mishaps, as they both learn to see eye to eye and listen to each other.

title: Hideaway (1995)
cast: Jeff Goldblum Christine Lahti Alicia Silverstone Jeremy Sisto Alfred Molina
overview: Hatch Harrison, his wife, Lindsey, and their daughter, Regina, are enjoying a pleasant drive when a car crash leaves wife and daughter unharmed but kills Hatch. However, an ingenious doctor, Jonas Nyebern, manages to revive Hatch after two lifeless hours. But Hatch does not come back unchanged. He begins to suffer horrible visions of murder -- only to find out the visions are the sights of a serial killer.

title: Fluke (1995)
cast: Matthew Modine Nancy Travis Eric Stoltz Max Pomeranc Ron Perlman
overview: Workaholic Thomas Johnson dies in an auto accident and reincarnates as a dog. Remembering some of his previous being, he returns to his wife and son to protect them from the man who caused his accident. But, as time goes by, his memories return, and Thomas realizes he wasn't such a good husband and father.

title: Farinelli: il castrato (1994)
cast: Stefano Dionisi Enrico Lo Verso Elsa Zylberstein Jeroen Krabbé Caroline Cellier
overview: The life and career of Italian opera singer Farinelli, considered one of the greatest castrato singers of all time.

title: Gordy (1995)
cast: Doug Stone Kristy Young James Donadio Deborah Hobart Tom Lester
overview: A talking pig named Gordy becomes involved in a quest to save his family from the slaughterhouse.

title: Hoop Dreams (1994)
cast: William Gates Arthur Agee Gene Pingatore Steve James Dick Vitale
overview: Every school day, African-American teenagers William Gates and Arthur Agee travel 90 minutes each way from inner-city Chicago to St. Joseph High School in Westchester, Illinois, a predominately white suburban school well-known for the excellence of its basketball program. Gates and Agee dream of NBA stardom, and with the support of their close-knit families, they battle the social and physical obstacles that stand in their way. This acclaimed documentary was shot over the course of five years.

title: Heavenly Creatures (1994)
cast: Melanie Lynskey Kate Winslet Sarah Peirse Diana Kent Clive Merrison
overview: Precocious teenager Juliet moves to New Zealand with her family and soon befriends the quiet, brooding Pauline through their shared love of fantasy and literature. This friendship gradually develops into an intense and obsessive bond.

title: Immortal Beloved (1994)
cast: Gary Oldman Jeroen Krabbé Isabella Rossellini Johanna ter Steege Marco Hofschneider
overview: A chronicle of the life of infamous classical composer Ludwig van Beethoven and his painful struggle with hearing loss. Following Beethoven's death in 1827, his assistant, Schindler, searches for an elusive woman referred to in the composer's love letters as "immortal beloved." As Schindler solves the mystery, a series of flashbacks reveal Beethoven's transformation from passionate young man to troubled musical genius.

title: Heavyweights (Heavy Weights) (1995)
cast: David Goldman Tom McGowan Joseph Wayne Miller Cody Burger Aaron Schwartz
overview: Camp Hope is a summer retreat for overweight boys run by a kindly couple who make the campers feel comfortable with their extra pounds. But when tyrannical fitness guru Tony buys the camp, he puts the kids on a cruel regimen that goes too far. Sick of the endless weeks of "all work and no play," the kids stage a coup and reclaim their summer of fun.

title: Hunted, The (1995)
cast: Christopher Lambert John Lone Yoshio Harada Yoko Shimada Tak Kubota
overview: Paul Racine, a high-powered American business executive in Japan, is catapulted into a maze of danger and intrigue after he and his sexy companion are the targets of assassins hired by the ruthless Kinjo.  To survive, Racine must join forces with a powerful samurai and together they will fight the force of evil in an awesome battle rooted in centuries of brutal conflict.

title: I.Q. (1994)
cast: Tim Robbins Meg Ryan Walter Matthau Lou Jacobi Gene Saks
overview: Albert Einstein helps a young man who's in love with Einstein's niece to catch her attention by pretending temporarily to be a great physicist.

title: Interview with the Vampire: The Vampire Chronicles (1994)
cast: Tom Cruise Brad Pitt Antonio Banderas Christian Slater Stephen Rea
overview: A vampire relates his epic life story of love, betrayal, loneliness, and dark hunger to an over-curious reporter.

title: Jefferson in Paris (1995)
cast: Nick Nolte Greta Scacchi Thandiwe Newton Gwyneth Paltrow Jean-Pierre Aumont
overview: His wife having recently died, Thomas Jefferson accepts the post of United States ambassador to pre-revolutionary France, though he finds it difficult to adjust to life in a country where the aristocracy subjugates an increasingly restless peasantry. In Paris, he becomes smitten with cultured artist Maria Cosway, but, when his daughter visits from Virginia accompanied by her attractive slave, Sally Hemings, Jefferson's attentions are diverted.

title: Jerky Boys, The (1995)
cast: John G. Brennan Kamal Ahmed Alan Arkin William Hickey Vincent Pastore
overview: When two unemployed telephone pranksters decide to use their vocal "talents" to impersonate a Chicago mob boss and curry favor with organized crime in New York, the trouble begins. It isn't long before Johnny and Kamal (the "Jerky Boys" of crank call fame) are wanted by the local mafia, the police, and their neighbor.

title: Junior (1994)
cast: Arnold Schwarzenegger Danny DeVito Emma Thompson Frank Langella Pamela Reed
overview: A research scientist becomes the world's first pregnant man in order to test a drug he and a colleague have designed for expectant women. To carry out the trial, he has an embryo implant, believing that he will only carry the baby for three months – hardly expecting to face the prospect of giving birth.

title: Just Cause (1995)
cast: Sean Connery Laurence Fishburne Blair Underwood Kate Capshaw Ruby Dee
overview: A Harvard professor is lured back into the courtroom after twenty-five years to take the case of a young black man condemned to death for the horrific murder of a child.

title: Kid in King Arthur's Court, A (1995)
cast: Thomas Ian Nicholas Joss Ackland Art Malik Daniel Craig Kate Winslet
overview: A Southern California kid named Calvin Fuller is magically transported to the medieval kingdom of Camelot through a crack in the ground caused by an earthquake. Once there, he learns he was summoned by the wizard Merlin, who needs Calvin to save Camelot. Using dazzling modern inventions, can Calvin help King Arthur retain his crown and thwart the evil Lord Belasco?

title: Kiss of Death (1995)
cast: David Caruso Nicolas Cage Samuel L. Jackson Helen Hunt Kathryn Erbe
overview: Jimmy Kilmartin's an ex-con who's trying to go straight. But he can't say no to a quick driving job because his so-called friend's life is threatened. The job is for Little Junior Brown, a violent and powerful villain. When things go wrong, Jimmy is left to do the time, and his whole life is turned upside-down, but if that wasn't enough, the cops won't leave Jimmy alone when he gets out... They want Little Junior Brown.

title: Star Wars: Episode IV - A New Hope (1977)
cast: Mark Hamill Harrison Ford Carrie Fisher Peter Cushing Alec Guinness
overview: Princess Leia is captured and held hostage by the evil Imperial forces in their effort to take over the galactic Empire. Venturesome Luke Skywalker and dashing captain Han Solo team together with the loveable robot duo R2-D2 and C-3PO to rescue the beautiful princess and restore peace and justice in the Empire.

title: Little Women (1994)
cast: Winona Ryder Trini Alvarado Samantha Mathis Kirsten Dunst Claire Danes
overview: Four sisters come of age in America in the aftermath of the Civil War.

title: Little Princess, A (1995)
cast: Liesel Matthews Eleanor Bron Liam Cunningham Rusty Schwimmer Vanessa Lee Chester
overview: When her father enlists to fight for the British in WWI, young Sara Crewe goes to New York to attend the same boarding school her late mother attended. She soon clashes with the severe headmistress, Miss Minchin, who attempts to stifle Sara's creativity and sense of self-worth.

title: Ladybird Ladybird (1994)
cast: Crissy Rock Vladimir Vega Sandie Lavelle Mauricio Venegas Ray Winstone
overview: Maggie has had four children, by four different fathers, removed by social services because of a previous violent relationship. When she meets Jorge, a gentle Latin American refugee, she gradually sees her chance for happiness, but her history still haunts her.

title: Like Water for Chocolate (Como agua para chocolate) (1992)
cast: Lumi Cavazos Marco Leonardi Regina Torné Mario Iván Martínez Ada Carrasco
overview: Tita is passionately in love with Pedro, but her controlling mother forbids her from marrying him. When Pedro marries her sister, Tita throws herself into her cooking and discovers she can transfer her emotions through the food she prepares, infecting all who eat it with her intense heartbreak.

title: Legends of the Fall (1994)
cast: Brad Pitt Anthony Hopkins Aidan Quinn Julia Ormond Henry Thomas
overview: In early 20th-century Montana, Col. William Ludlow lives on a ranch in the wilderness with his sons, Alfred, Tristan, and Samuel. Eventually, the unconventional but close-knit family are bound by loyalty, tested by war, and torn apart by love, as told over the course of several decades in this epic saga.

title: Major Payne (1995)
cast: Damon Wayans Karyn Parsons William Hickey Michael Ironside Albert Hall
overview: Major Benson Winifred Payne is being discharged from the Marines. Payne is a killin' machine, but the wars of the world are no longer fought on the battlefield. A career Marine, he has no idea what to do as a civilian, so his commander finds him a job - commanding officer of a local school's JROTC program, a bunch of ragtag losers with no hope.

title: My Crazy Life (Mi vida loca) (1993)
cast: Angel Aviles Seidy López Jacob Vargas Devine Monica Lutton
overview: Two Indigenous Latina bestfriends, Mousie and Sad Girl live in a contemporary Los Angeles poor Indigenous Hispanic American neighborhood. But when Sad Girl becomes pregnant by Mousie's boyfriend, a drug dealer named Ernesto, the two become bitter enemies. While their dispute escalates towards violence, the violence of the world around them soon also impacts their lives.

title: Love Affair (1994)
cast: Warren Beatty Annette Bening Katharine Hepburn Garry Shandling Chloe Webb
overview: Ex-football star Mike Gambril meets Terry McKay on a flight to Sydney, which is forced to land on a small atoll. They become romantic on board a ship sent to take them to a larger island. They agree to meet in New York three months later to see if the attraction is real. One shows up but the other doesn't. However, a chance meeting brings them together again.

title: Losing Isaiah (1995)
cast: Jessica Lange Halle Berry David Strathairn Cuba Gooding Jr. Daisy Eagan
overview: Khaila Richards, a crack-addicted single mother, accidentally leaves her baby in a dumpster while high and returns the next day in a panic to find he is missing. In reality, the baby has been adopted by a warm-hearted social worker, Margaret Lewin, and her husband, Charles. Years later, Khaila has gone through rehab and holds a steady job. After learning that her child is still alive, she challenges Margaret for the custody.

title: Madness of King George, The (1994)
cast: Nigel Hawthorne Helen Mirren Ian Holm Anthony Calf Amanda Donohoe
overview: Aging King George III of England is exhibiting signs of madness, a problem little understood in 1788. As the monarch alternates between bouts of confusion and near-violent outbursts of temper, his hapless doctors attempt the ineffectual cures of the day. Meanwhile, Queen Charlotte and Prime Minister William Pitt the Younger attempt to prevent the king's political enemies, led by the Prince of Wales, from usurping the throne.

title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein (Frankenstein) (1994)
cast: Robert De Niro Kenneth Branagh Tom Hulce Helena Bonham Carter Aidan Quinn
overview: Victor Frankenstein is a promising young doctor who, devastated by the death of his mother during childbirth, becomes obsessed with bringing the dead back to life. His experiments lead to the creation of a monster, which Frankenstein has put together with the remains of corpses. It's not long before Frankenstein regrets his actions.

title: Man of the House (1995)
cast: Jonathan Taylor Thomas Chevy Chase Farrah Fawcett George Wendt David Shiner
overview: Ben Archer is not happy. His mother, Sandy, has just met a man, and it looks like things are pretty serious. Driven by a fear of abandonment, Ben tries anything and everything to ruin the "love bubble" which surrounds his mom. However, after Ben and Jack's experiences in the Indian Guides, the two become much closer.

title: Mixed Nuts (1994)
cast: Steve Martin Madeline Kahn Rita Wilson Juliette Lewis Anthony LaPaglia
overview: The events of a crisis hotline business on one crazy night during the Christmas holidays.

title: Milk Money (1994)
cast: Melanie Griffith Ed Harris Michael Patrick Carter Malcolm McDowell Anne Heche
overview: Three young boys pool their money and pay V, a kindhearted prostitute, to strip for them. Afterward, she drives them home to the suburbs -- but then her car breaks down. It's just as well, though, because a mobster named Waltzer is after her, and V realizes the suburbs are the perfect place to hide. But things get a lot more complicated when V falls in love with Tom, a single father who is unaware of her real profession.

title: Miracle on 34th Street (1994)
cast: Mara Wilson Richard Attenborough Dylan McDermott Elizabeth Perkins J.T. Walsh
overview: Six-year-old Susan Walker has doubts about childhood's most enduring miracle—Santa Claus. Her mother told her the secret about Santa a long time ago, but, after meeting a special department store Santa who's convinced he's the real thing, Susan is given the most precious gift of all—something to believe in.

title: Miami Rhapsody (1995)
cast: Sarah Jessica Parker Gil Bellows Antonio Banderas Mia Farrow Paul Mazursky
overview: Even though Gwyn Marcus is engaged to her boyfriend, Matt, she is still afraid of commitment. While she admires her parents' loving relationship, she discovers that her family has not always been faithful in marriage, making it harder than ever to settle down. As her mother pressures her to get married, and plenty of attractive men appear in her life, Gwyn learns that she must balance her career, relationships and marriage to be truly happy.

title: My Family (1995)
cast: Edward James Olmos Jimmy Smits Esai Morales Jennifer Lopez Jacob Vargas
overview: Traces over three generations an immigrant family's trials, tribulations, tragedies, and triumphs. Maria and Jose, the first generation, come to Los Angeles, meet, marry, face deportation all in the 1930s. They establish their family in East L.A., and their children Chucho, Paco, Memo, Irene, Toni, and Jimmy deal with youth culture and the L.A. police in the '50s. As the second generation become adults in the '60s, the focus shifts to Jimmy, his marriage to Isabel (a Salvadorian refugee), their son, and Jimmy's journey to becoming a responsible parent.

title: Murder in the First (1995)
cast: Christian Slater Kevin Bacon Gary Oldman Embeth Davidtz William H. Macy
overview: A young, inexperienced public defender is assigned to defend an inmate accused of committing murder while behind bars.

title: Nobody's Fool (1994)
cast: Paul Newman Bruce Willis Melanie Griffith Jessica Tandy Dylan Walsh
overview: A rascally nearing-retirement man juggles a workers' compensation suit while secretly working for his nemesis and flirting with his nemesis' young wife. As his estranged son returns, he faces new family responsibilities, while a banker plots to evict him from his home.

title: Nell (1994)
cast: Jodie Foster Liam Neeson Natasha Richardson Richard Libertini Robin Mullins
overview: In a remote woodland cabin, a small town doctor discovers Nell — a beautiful young hermit woman with many secrets.

title: New Jersey Drive (1995)
cast: Sharron Corley Gabriel Casseus Saul Stein Donald Faison Gwen McGee
overview: Jason and Midget are two young, black teenagers living in Newark, New Jersey, the unofficial car theft capital of the world. Their favourite pastime is that of everybody in their neighbourhood: stealing cars and joyriding. The trouble starts when they steal a police car and the cops launch a violent offensive that involves beating and even shooting suspects.

title: Natural Born Killers (1994)
cast: Woody Harrelson Juliette Lewis Robert Downey Jr. Tommy Lee Jones Tom Sizemore
overview: Two victims of traumatized childhoods become lovers and serial murderers irresponsibly glorified by the mass media.

title: Only You (1994)
cast: Marisa Tomei Robert Downey Jr. Bonnie Hunt Joaquim de Almeida Fisher Stevens
overview: Two childhood paranormal incidents have convinced schoolteacher Faith Corvatch that her true love is a guy named 'Damon Bradley', but she has yet to meet him. Preparing to marry podiatrist Dwayne in ten days, Faith receives a phone call from Dwayne's old classmate Damon Bradley, who is on his way to Venice. She impulsively decides to fly to Italy with the hope of finally encountering the man of her dreams. Accompanying her on the trip is her sister-in-law and best friend Kate, who has just left her husband, Faith's brother Larry.

title: Once Were Warriors (1994)
cast: Rena Owen Temuera Morrison Mamaengaroa Kerr-Bell Julian Arahanga Taungaroa Emile
overview: In a violent relationship, it takes a mother’s strength to save herself and her children from the man she loved. Once Were Warriors is a violent love story set against a contemporary urban backdrop.

title: Poison Ivy II (1996)
cast: Alyssa Milano Xander Berkeley Johnathon Schaech Victoria Haas Camilla Belle
overview: A young and naive college art student becomes obsessed with assuming the identity and personality of a departed coed who used to live in her room, and in so doing causes complications that result in two men, a student and her art professor, lusting after her.

title: Outbreak (1995)
cast: Dustin Hoffman Rene Russo Morgan Freeman Kevin Spacey Cuba Gooding Jr.
overview: A deadly airborne virus finds its way into the USA and starts killing off people at an epidemic rate. Col. Sam Daniels' job is to stop the virus spreading from a small town, which must be quarantined, and to prevent an over reaction by the White House.

title: Perez Family, The (1995)
cast: Marisa Tomei Alfred Molina Anjelica Huston Chazz Palminteri Trini Alvarado
overview: In the midst of the Mariel boat lift -- a hurried exodus of refugees from Cuba going to America -- an immigration clerk accidentally presumes that dissident Juan Raul Perez and Dorita Evita Perez are married. United by their last name and a mutual resolve to emigrate, Dorita and Juan agree to play along. But it gets complicated when the two begin falling for each other just as Juan reunites with his wife, Carmela, whom he hasn't seen in decades.

title: Pyromaniac's Love Story, A (1995)
cast: William Baldwin John Leguizamo Erika Eleniak Michael Lerner Armin Mueller-Stahl
overview: A pastry boy and the son of a hair-piece mogul become involved in an arson scandal. Sergio is offered a bribe in exchange for taking the blame for the fire that destroys his workplace. Garet, the real arsonist, is apalled that someone else would try to take credit for his act of love. Before long, Sergio and Garet become entangled in a zany love-quadrangle involving Hattie and Stephanie. Written by Brian Whiting

title: Pulp Fiction (1994)
cast: John Travolta Samuel L. Jackson Uma Thurman Bruce Willis Ving Rhames
overview: A burger-loving hit man, his philosophical partner, a drug-addled gangster's moll and a washed-up boxer converge in this sprawling, comedic crime caper. Their adventures unfurl in three stories that ingeniously trip back and forth in time.

title: Pushing Hands (Tui shou) (1992)
cast: Lung Sihung Wang Bozhao Deb Snyder Wang Lai Fanny De Luz
overview: Mr. Chu is an elderly widower who teaches tai chi chuan in Beijing. He moves to America to live with his son's family, but finds the cultural adjustment difficult. Since his daughter-in-law is a white woman who does not speak Chinese, Mr. Chu's son, Alex, must mediate.

title: Priest (1994)
cast: Linus Roache Tom Wilkinson Robert Carlyle Cathy Tyson Lesley Sharp
overview: The deeply held religious convictions of an idealistic young priest are challenged when he must face extraordinary events within his own congregation.

title: Quiz Show (1994)
cast: John Turturro Rob Morrow Ralph Fiennes Paul Scofield David Paymer
overview: Herbert Stempel's transformation into an unexpected television personality unfolds as he secures victory on the cherished American game show, 'Twenty-One.' However, when the show introduces the highly skilled contestant Charles Van Doren to replace Stempel, it compels Stempel to let out his frustrations and call out the show as rigged. Lawyer Richard Goodwin steps in and attempts to uncover the orchestrated deception behind the scenes.

title: Picture Bride (Bijo photo) (1994)
cast: Youki Kudoh Akira Takayama Tamlyn Tomita Cary-Hiroyuki Tagawa Toshirō Mifune
overview: Riyo, an orphaned 17-year old, sails from Yokohama to Hawaii in 1918 to marry Matsuji, a man she has never met. Hoping to escape a troubled past and start anew, Riyo is bitterly disappointed upon her arrival: her husband is twice her age. The miserable girl finds solace with her new friend Kana, a young mother who helps Riyo accept her new life.

title: Queen Margot (Reine Margot, La) (1994)
cast: Isabelle Adjani Daniel Auteuil Jean-Hugues Anglade Vincent Perez Virna Lisi
overview: Paris, Kingdom of France, August 18, 1572. To avoid the outbreak of a religious war, the Catholic princess Marguerite de Valois, sister of the feeble King Charles IX, marries the Huguenot King Henry III of Navarre.

title: Quick and the Dead, The (1995)
cast: Sharon Stone Gene Hackman Russell Crowe Leonardo DiCaprio Tobin Bell
overview: A mysterious woman comes to compete in a quick-draw elimination tournament, in a town taken over by a notorious gunman.

title: Roommates (1995)
cast: Peter Falk D. B. Sweeney Julianne Moore Ellen Burstyn Jan Rubeš
overview: An elderly, yet young-at-heart man, moves in with his grandson, and both their lives turn upside-down.

title: Ready to Wear (Pret-A-Porter) (1994)
cast: Marcello Mastroianni Sophia Loren Jean-Pierre Cassel Kim Basinger Chiara Mastroianni
overview: During Paris Fashion Week, models, designers and industry hot shots gather to work, mingle, argue and try to seduce one another.

title: Three Colors: Red (Trois couleurs: Rouge) (1994)
cast: Irène Jacob Jean-Louis Trintignant Frédérique Feder Jean-Pierre Lorit Samuel Le Bihan
overview: Part-time model Valentine unexpectedly befriends a retired judge after she runs over his dog. At first, the grumpy man shows no concern about the dog, and Valentine decides to keep it. But the two form a bond when she returns to his house and catches him listening to his neighbors’ phone calls.

title: Three Colors: Blue (Trois couleurs: Bleu) (1993)
cast: Juliette Binoche Benoît Régent Florence Pernel Charlotte Véry Hélène Vincent
overview: The wife of a famous composer survives a car accident that kills her husband and daughter. Now alone, she shakes off her old identity and explores her newfound freedom but finds that she is unbreakably bound to other humans, including her husband’s mistress, whose existence she never suspected.

title: Three Colors: White (Trzy kolory: Bialy) (1994)
cast: Zbigniew Zamachowski Julie Delpy Janusz Gajos Jerzy Stuhr Grzegorz Warchoł
overview: Polish immigrant Karol Karol finds himself out of a marriage, a job and a country when his French wife, Dominique, divorces him after six months due to his impotence. Forced to leave France after losing the business they jointly owned, Karol enlists fellow Polish expatriate Mikołaj to smuggle him back to their homeland.

title: Rent-a-Kid (1995)
cast: Leslie Nielsen Christopher Lloyd Matt McCoy Sherry Miller Amos Crawley
overview: Harry Habert, owner of a rental company, has an original idea—to rent baby's from a nearby orphanage to local families. He rents the Ward siblings, 2 boys and a girl, to his first customers.

title: Relative Fear (1994)
cast: Darlanne Fluegel James Brolin Martin Neufeld Denise Crosby M. Emmet Walsh
overview: Linda and Peter Pratman's son Adam is autistic, but they still love him and hope that he'll at least start talking some day. However he's teased and abused by the kids of the neighborhood and his grandpa . When several people around Adam die an unexpected death, his parents start to suspect Adam - is he just simulating to be so ignorant about his environment?

title: Stuart Saves His Family (1995)
cast: Al Franken Laura San Giacomo Vincent D'Onofrio Shirley Knight Harris Yulin
overview: A self-help advocate struggles to put his dysfunctional family in its place.

title: Swan Princess, The (1994)
cast: Jack Palance Howard McGillin Michelle Nicastro Liz Callaway John Cleese
overview: The beautiful princess Odette is transformed into a swan by an evil sorcerer's spell. Held captive at an enchanted lake, she befriends Jean-Bob the frog, Speed the turtle and Puffin the bird. Despite their struggle to keep the princess safe, these good-natured creatures can do nothing about the sorcerer's spell, which can only be broken by a vow of everlasting love.

title: Secret of Roan Inish, The (1994)
cast: Jeni Courtney Eileen Colgan Mick Lally John Lynch Pat Slowey
overview: Ten-year-old Fiona is sent to live with her grandparents in a small fishing village in Donegal, Ireland. She soon learns the local legend that an ancestor of hers married a Selkie – a seal who can turn into a human. Years earlier, her baby brother was washed out to sea and never seen again, so when Fiona spies a naked little boy on the abandoned Isle of Roan Inish, she is compelled to investigate.

title: Specialist, The (1994)
cast: Sylvester Stallone Sharon Stone James Woods Rod Steiger Eric Roberts
overview: May Munro is a woman obsessed with getting revenge on the people who murdered her parents when she was still a girl. She hires Ray Quick, a retired explosives expert, to kill her parents' killers. When Ned Trent, embittered ex-partner of Quick's, is assigned to protect one of Quick's potential victims, a deadly game of cat and mouse ensues.

title: Stargate (1994)
cast: James Spader Kurt Russell Jaye Davidson Viveca Lindfors Alexis Cruz
overview: An interstellar teleportation device, found in Egypt, leads to a planet with humans resembling ancient Egyptians who worship the god Ra.

title: Santa Clause, The (1994)
cast: Tim Allen Judge Reinhold Wendy Crewson Eric Lloyd David Krumholtz
overview: On Christmas Eve, divorced dad Scott Calvin and his son discover Santa Claus has fallen off their roof. When Scott takes the reins of the magical sleigh, he finds he is now the new Santa, and must convince a world of disbelievers, including himself.

title: Shawshank Redemption, The (1994)
cast: Tim Robbins Morgan Freeman Bob Gunton William Sadler Clancy Brown
overview: Imprisoned in the 1940s for the double murder of his wife and her lover, upstanding banker Andy Dufresne begins a new life at the Shawshank prison, where he puts his accounting skills to work for an amoral warden. During his long stretch in prison, Dufresne comes to be admired by the other inmates -- including an older prisoner named Red -- for his integrity and unquenchable sense of hope.

title: Shallow Grave (1994)
cast: Ewan McGregor Christopher Eccleston Kerry Fox Ken Stott Keith Allen
overview: When David, Juliet, and Alex find their new roommate dead with a large sum of money, they agree to hide the body and keep the cash. However, this newfound fortune gradually corrodes their friendship.

title: Suture (1993)
cast: Dennis Haysbert Mel Harris Sab Shimono Dina Merrill Michael Harris
overview: A man named Clay  flies into Phoenix for a reunion with his long-lost half-brother Vincent.

title: Strawberry and Chocolate (Fresa y chocolate) (1993)
cast: Jorge Perugorría Vladimir Cruz Mirta Ibarra Francisco Gattorno Joel Angelino
overview: In 1979 Cuba, flamboyant gay artist Diego attempts to seduce  straitlaced David, an idealistic young communist, and fails dismally. But David conspires to be "friends" with Diego so he can monitor the artist's subversive life for the state. As Diego and David discuss politics, individuality and personal expression in Castro's Cuba, a genuine friendship develops between the two.

title: Swimming with Sharks (1995)
cast: Kevin Spacey Frank Whaley Michelle Forbes Benicio del Toro T.E. Russell
overview: Guy is a young film executive who's willing to do whatever it takes to make it in Hollywood. He begins working for famed producer Buddy Ackerman, a domineering, manipulative, coldhearted boss. When Guy also finds out that his cynical girlfriend, Dawn, has been using sex as a career move, he reaches his limit. Guy decides to exact revenge on Buddy by kidnapping him and subjecting him to cruel and unusual punishment.

title: Sum of Us, The (1994)
cast: Jack Thompson Russell Crowe John Polson Deborah Kennedy Joss Moroney
overview: A widowed father has to deal with two complex issues: while he is searching for "Miss Right," his son, who is in his 20s and gay, is searching for "Mr. Right."

title: National Lampoon's Senior Trip (1995)
cast: Matt Frewer Valerie Mahaffey Lawrence Dane Tommy Chong Jeremy Renner
overview: While on detention, a group of misfits and slackers have to write a letter to the President explaining what is wrong with the education system. There is only one problem, the President loves it! Hence, the group must travel to Washington to meet the Main Man.

title: To Live (Huozhe) (1994)
cast: Ge You Gong Li Niu Ben Guo Tao Jiang Wu
overview: Married couple Fugui and Jiazhen endure tumultuous events in mid-20th century mainland China as their personal fortunes move from wealthy landownership to peasantry.

title: Tank Girl (1995)
cast: Lori Petty Naomi Watts Malcolm McDowell Ice-T Jeff Kober
overview: After a comet disrupts the rain cycle of Earth, the planet has become a desolate, barren desert by the year 2033. With resources scarce, Kesslee, head of the powerful and evil Water & Power Corporation, the de facto government, has taken control of the water supply. Unwilling to cower under Kesslee's tyrannical rule, a pair of outlaws known as Tank Girl and Jet Girl rise up, joining the mysterious rebel Rippers to destroy the corrupt system.

title: Tales from the Crypt Presents: Demon Knight (1995)
cast: Billy Zane William Sadler Jada Pinkett Smith CCH Pounder Brenda Bakke
overview: Ex-soldier Frank Brayker is the guardian of an ancient key that can unlock tremendous evil; the sinister Collector is a demon who wants the key so he can initiate the apocalypse. On the run from wicked mercenaries for almost 90 years, Brayker finally stops in at a boarding house in New Mexico where — with the help of its residents — he plans to face off against the Collector and his band of ghouls, preventing them from ever seizing the key.

title: Star Trek: Generations (1994)
cast: Patrick Stewart Jonathan Frakes Brent Spiner LeVar Burton Michael Dorn
overview: Captain Jean-Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise-D find themselves at odds with the renegade scientist Soran who is destroying entire star systems. Only one man can help Picard stop Soran's scheme...and he's been dead for seventy-eight years.

title: Tales from the Hood (1995)
cast: Clarence Williams III Joe Torry De'Aundre Bonds Samuel Monroe Jr. Wings Hauser
overview: A strange mortician tells four horrific tales to three drug dealers that he traps in a local funeral parlor.

title: Tom & Viv (1994)
cast: Willem Dafoe Miranda Richardson Rosemary Harris Tim Dutton Nickolas Grace
overview: The story of the marriage of the poet T. S. Eliot to socialite Vivienne Haigh-Wood, which had to cope with her gynaecological and emotional problems and his growing fame.

title: Village of the Damned (1995)
cast: Christopher Reeve Kirstie Alley Linda Kozlowski Michael Paré Meredith Salenger
overview: An American village is visited by some unknown life form which leaves the women of the village pregnant. Nine months later, the babies are born, and they all look normal, but it doesn't take the "parents" long to realize that the kids are not human or humane.

title: Tommy Boy (1995)
cast: Chris Farley David Spade Brian Dennehy Julie Warner Bo Derek
overview: To save the family business, two ne’er-do-well traveling salesmen hit the road with disastrously funny consequences.

title: Vanya on 42nd Street (1994)
cast: Wallace Shawn Julianne Moore Larry Pine Brooke Smith George Gaynes
overview: An uninterrupted rehearsal of Chekhov's 'Uncle Vanya' plays out by a company of actors. The setting: their run-down theater with an unusable stage and crumbling ceiling. The play is shown act by act with the briefest of breaks to move props or for refreshments. The lack of costumes, real props and scenery is soon forgotten.

title: Underneath (1995)
cast: Peter Gallagher Alison Elliott William Fichtner Adam Trese Joe Don Baker
overview: A recovering gambling addict attempts to reconcile with his family and friends but finds trouble and temptation when caught between feelings for his ex-wife and her dangerous hoodlum boyfriend.

title: Walking Dead, The (1995)
cast: Allen Payne Eddie Griffin Joe Morton Vonte Sweet Roger Floyd
overview: Five young marines on a suicide mission in Vietnam, struggle for survival in a jungle minefield. The mean streets of home did not prepare them for this.

title: What's Eating Gilbert Grape (1993)
cast: Johnny Depp Leonardo DiCaprio Juliette Lewis Mary Steenburgen Darlene Cates
overview: Gilbert Grape is a small-town young man with a lot of responsibility. Chief among his concerns are his mother, who is so overweight that she can't leave the house, and his mentally impaired younger brother, Arnie, who has a knack for finding trouble. Settled into a job at a grocery store and an ongoing affair with local woman Betty Carver, Gilbert finally has his life shaken up by the free-spirited Becky.

title: Virtuosity (1995)
cast: Denzel Washington Russell Crowe Kelly Lynch Alanna Ubach William Forsythe
overview: The Law Enforcement Technology Advancement Centre (LETAC) has developed SID version 6.7: a Sadistic, Intelligent, and Dangerous virtual reality entity which is synthesized from the personalities of more than 150 serial killers, and only one man can stop him.

title: While You Were Sleeping (1995)
cast: Sandra Bullock Bill Pullman Peter Gallagher Peter Boyle Jack Warden
overview: A transit worker pulls commuter Peter off railway tracks after he's mugged, but—while he's in a coma—his family mistakenly thinks she's Peter's fiancée, and she doesn't correct them. Things get more complicated when she falls for his brother, who's not quite sure that she's who she claims to be.

title: War, The (1994)
cast: Elijah Wood Kevin Costner Mare Winningham Lexi Randall LaToya Chisholm
overview: The son of a Vietnam War Veteran must deal with neighborhood bullies as well as his dad's post-traumatic stress disorder while growing up in the deep south in the 1970's.

title: Double Happiness (1994)
cast: Sandra Oh Stephen Chang Alannah Ong Frances You Donald Fong
overview: Jade Li is a feisty, 20-something Chinese Canadian, trying to achieve that happy medium between giving in to her parent's wishes and fulfilling her own needs and desires - double happiness. Naturally, something's got to give and when love beckons in the shape of Mark, a white university student, the facade of the perfect Chinese daughter begins to slip.

title: Muriel's Wedding (1994)
cast: Toni Collette Bill Hunter Rachel Griffiths Sophie Lee Jeanie Drynan
overview: Socially awkward Muriel Heslop wants nothing more than to get married. Unfortunately, due to her oppressive politician father, Muriel has never even been on a date. Ostracized by her more socially adept friends, Muriel runs into fellow outcast Rhonda Epinstalk, and the two move from their small Australian town to the big city of Sydney, where Muriel changes her name and begins the arduous task of redesigning her life to match her fantasies.

title: Baby-Sitters Club, The (1995)
cast: Schuyler Fisk Bre Blair Rachael Leigh Cook Larisa Oleynik Tricia Joe
overview: Seven junior-high-school girls organize a daycare camp for children while at the same time experiencing classic adolescent growing pains.

title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective (1994)
cast: Jim Carrey Courteney Cox Sean Young Tone Loc Dan Marino
overview: He's Ace Ventura: Pet Detective. The Ace is on the case to find the Miami Dolphins' missing mascot and quarterback Dan Marino. He goes eyeball to eyeball with a man-eating shark, stakes out the Miami Dolphins and woos and wows the ladies. Whether he's undercover, under fire or underwater, he always gets his man… or beast!

title: Adventures of Priscilla, Queen of the Desert, The (1994)
cast: Hugo Weaving Guy Pearce Terence Stamp Bill Hunter Sarah Chadwick
overview: Two drag performers and a transgender woman travel across the desert to perform their unique style of cabaret.

title: Bitter Moon (1992)
cast: Peter Coyote Emmanuelle Seigner Hugh Grant Kristin Scott Thomas Victor Banerjee
overview: A passenger on a cruise ship develops an irresistible infatuation with an eccentric paraplegic's wife.

title: Bullets Over Broadway (1994)
cast: John Cusack Chazz Palminteri Dianne Wiest Jennifer Tilly Mary-Louise Parker
overview: After young playwright, David Shayne obtains funding for his play from gangster Nick Valenti, Nick's girlfriend Olive miraculously lands the role of a psychiatrist—but not only is she a bimbo who could never pass for a psychiatrist—she's a dreadful actress. David puts up with the leading man who is a compulsive eater, the grand dame who wants her part jazzed up, and Olive's interfering hitman/bodyguard—but, eventually he must decide whether art or life is more important.

title: Clear and Present Danger (1994)
cast: Harrison Ford Willem Dafoe Joaquim de Almeida Henry Czerny Harris Yulin
overview: Agent Jack Ryan becomes acting Deputy Director of Intelligence for the CIA when Admiral Greer is diagnosed with cancer. When an American businessman, and friend of the president, is murdered on his yacht, Ryan starts discovering links between the man and drug dealers. As former CIA agent John Clark is sent to Colombia to kill drug cartel kingpins in retaliation, Ryan must fight through multiple cover-ups to figure out what happened and who's responsible.

title: Client, The (1994)
cast: Brad Renfro Susan Sarandon Tommy Lee Jones Mary-Louise Parker Anthony LaPaglia
overview: A street-wise kid, Mark Sway, sees the suicide of Jerome Clifford, a prominent Louisiana lawyer, whose current client is Barry 'The Blade' Muldano, a Mafia hit-man. Before Jerome shoots himself, he tells Mark where the body of a Senator is buried. Clifford shoots himself and Mark is found at the scene, and both the FBI and the Mafia quickly realize that Mark probably knows more than he says.

title: Corrina, Corrina (1994)
cast: Whoopi Goldberg Ray Liotta Tina Majorino Joan Cusack Larry Miller
overview: When Manny Singer's wife dies, his young daughter Molly becomes mute and withdrawn. To help cope with looking after Molly, he hires sassy housekeeper Corrina Washington, who coaxes Molly out of her shell and shows father and daughter a whole new way of life. Manny and Corrina's friendship delights Molly and enrages the other townspeople.

title: Crooklyn (1994)
cast: Alfre Woodard Delroy Lindo David Patrick Kelly Zelda Harris Carlton Williams
overview: From Spike Lee comes this vibrant semi-autobiographical portrait of a school-teacher, her stubborn jazz-musician husband and their five kids living in '70s Brooklyn.

title: Crow, The (1994)
cast: Brandon Lee Rochelle Davis Ernie Hudson Michael Wincott Bai Ling
overview: Exactly one year after young rock guitarist Eric Draven and his fiancée are brutally killed by a ruthless gang of criminals, Draven, watched over by a hypnotic crow, returns from the grave to exact revenge.

title: Cobb (1994)
cast: Tommy Lee Jones Robert Wuhl Lolita Davidovich Ned Bellamy Scott Burkholder
overview: Al Stump is a famous sports-writer chosen by Ty Cobb to co-write his official, authorized 'autobiography' before his death. Cobb, widely feared and despised, feels misunderstood and wants to set the record straight about 'the greatest ball-player ever,' in his words.

title: Flintstones, The (1994)
cast: John Goodman Elizabeth Perkins Rick Moranis Rosie O'Donnell Kyle MacLachlan
overview: Modern Stone Age family the Flintstones hit the big screen in this live-action version of the classic cartoon. Fred helps Barney adopt a child. Barney sees an opportunity to repay him when Slate Mining tests its employees to find a new executive. But no good deed goes unpunished.

title: Forrest Gump (1994)
cast: Tom Hanks Robin Wright Gary Sinise Sally Field Mykelti Williamson
overview: A man with a low IQ has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events—in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. But despite all he has achieved, his one true love eludes him.

title: Four Weddings and a Funeral (1994)
cast: Hugh Grant Andie MacDowell Kristin Scott Thomas Simon Callow James Fleet
overview: Over the course of five social occasions, a committed bachelor must consider the notion that he may have discovered love.

title: Higher Learning (1995)
cast: Omar Epps Kristy Swanson Michael Rapaport Jennifer Connelly Ice Cube
overview: African-American student Malik is on a track scholarship; academics are not his strong suit, and he goes in thinking that his athletic abilities will earn him a free ride through college. Fudge, a "professional student" who has been at Columbus for six years so far, becomes friendly with Malik and challenges his views about race and politics in America.

title: I Like It Like That (1994)
cast: Luna Lauren Vélez Jon Seda Tomas Melly Desiree Casado Isaiah Garcia
overview: After her husband is arrested for looting, Lisette struggles for independence while dealing with her transgender sibling, her critical mother-in-law and assorted neighborhood eccentrics.

title: I Love Trouble (1994)
cast: Nick Nolte Julia Roberts Saul Rubinek James Rebhorn Robert Loggia
overview: Rival Chicago reporters Sabrina Peterson and Peter Brackett join forces to uncover a train wreck conspiracy.

title: It Could Happen to You (1994)
cast: Nicolas Cage Bridget Fonda Rosie Perez Wendell Pierce Isaac Hayes
overview: Charlie Lang is a simple, kindhearted New York City cop. When he realizes he has no money to tip waitress Yvonne Biasi, Lang offers her half the winnings of his lottery ticket. Amazingly, the ticket happens to be a winner, in the sum of $4 million. True to his word, Lang proceeds to share the prize money with Biasi, which infuriates his greedy wife, Muriel. Not content with the arrangement, Muriel begins scheming to take all the money.

title: Jungle Book, The (1994)
cast: Bruce Reitherman Phil Harris Sebastian Cabot George Sanders Sterling Holloway
overview: The boy Mowgli makes his way to the man-village with Bagheera, the wise panther. Along the way he meets jazzy King Louie, the hypnotic snake Kaa and the lovable, happy-go-lucky bear Baloo, who teaches Mowgli "The Bare Necessities" of life and the true meaning of friendship.

title: Wonderful, Horrible Life of Leni Riefenstahl, The (Macht der Bilder: Leni Riefenstahl, Die) (1993)
cast: Leni Riefenstahl Walter Frentz Horst Kettner Ray Müller Luis Trenker
overview: This documentary recounts the life and work of one of most famous, and yet reviled, German film directors in history, Leni Riefenstahl. The film recounts the rise of her career from a dancer, to a movie actor to the most important film director in Nazi Germany who directed such famous propaganda films as Triumph of the Will and Olympiad. The film also explores her later activities after Nazi Germany's defeat in 1945 and her disgrace for being so associated with it which includes her amazingly active life over the age of 90.

title: Lion King, The (1994)
cast: Matthew Broderick Moira Kelly Jeremy Irons Nathan Lane Ernie Sabella
overview: Young lion prince Simba, eager to one day become king of the Pride Lands, grows up under the watchful eye of his father Mufasa; all the while his villainous uncle Scar conspires to take the throne for himself. Amid betrayal and tragedy, Simba must confront his past and find his rightful place in the Circle of Life.

title: Little Buddha (1993)
cast: Keanu Reeves Bridget Fonda Chris Isaak Ruocheng Ying Alex Wiesendanger
overview: After the death of Lama Dorje, Tibetan Buddhist monks find three children — one American and two Nepalese — who may be the rebirth of their great teacher.

title: Wes Craven's New Nightmare (Nightmare on Elm Street Part 7: Freddy's Finale, A) (1994)
cast: Heather Langenkamp Robert Englund Miko Hughes Wes Craven David Newsom
overview: A demonic force has chosen Freddy Krueger as its portal to the real world. Can Heather Langenkamp play the part of Nancy one last time and trap the evil trying to enter our world?

title: Mask, The (1994)
cast: Jim Carrey Peter Riegert Peter Greene Amy Yasbeck Richard Jeni
overview: Timid bank clerk Stanley Ipkiss discovers a magical mask infused with the spirit of the Norse god Loki. Donning it transforms him into an unrestrained, green-faced, cartoon-like wild man. While the mask grants him the confidence to woo a local singer, it also makes him the target of a ruthless mobster.

title: Maverick (1994)
cast: Mel Gibson Jodie Foster James Garner Graham Greene Alfred Molina
overview: Bret Maverick is a gambler who would rather con someone than fight them, and needs an additional $3k in order to enter a winner-takes-all poker game beginning in a few days. He joins forces with a woman with a marvelous Southern accent, and the two try and enter the game.

title: Mrs. Parker and the Vicious Circle (1994)
cast: Jennifer Jason Leigh Campbell Scott Matthew Broderick Peter Gallagher Jennifer Beals
overview: Dorothy Parker remembers the heyday of the Algonquin Round Table, a circle of friends whose barbed wit, like hers, was fueled by alcohol and flirted with despair.

title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult (1994)
cast: Leslie Nielsen Priscilla Presley George Kennedy O. J. Simpson Fred Ward
overview: Frank Drebin is persuaded out of retirement to go undercover in a state prison. There he has to find out what top terrorist, Rocco, has planned for when he escapes. Adding to his problems, Frank's wife, Jane, is desperate for a baby.

title: Paper, The (1994)
cast: Michael Keaton Robert Duvall Glenn Close Marisa Tomei Randy Quaid
overview: Henry Hackett is the workaholic editor of a New York City tabloid. He loves his job, but the long hours and low pay are leading to discontent. Also, publisher Bernie White faces financial straits, and has hatchet-man Alicia Clark—Henry's nemesis—impose unpopular cutbacks.

title: Reality Bites (1994)
cast: Winona Ryder Ethan Hawke Janeane Garofalo Steve Zahn Ben Stiller
overview: A small circle of friends suffering from post-collegiate blues must confront the hard truth about life, love and the pursuit of gainful employment. As they struggle to map out survival guides for the future, the Gen-X quartet soon begins to realize that reality isn't all it's cracked up to be.

title: Richie Rich (1994)
cast: Macaulay Culkin John Larroquette Edward Herrmann Christine Ebersole Jonathan Hyde
overview: Billionaire heir Richie Rich has it all, including Reggie Jackson as a batting coach and Claudia Schiffer as a personal trainer -- but no playmates. What's more, scoundrel Laurence Van Dough is scheming to take over the family empire. Uh-oh! Enter faithful butler Cadbury to save the day.

title: River Wild, The (1994)
cast: Meryl Streep David Strathairn Kevin Bacon John C. Reilly Joseph Mazzello
overview: Gail and Tom Hartman are struggling to stay together and decide to take a white-water rafting holiday adventure in Montana for their son Roarke's 10th birthday, only to meet up with a pair of mysterious men whose desperation grows, turning their vacation into a nightmare.

title: Speed (1994)
cast: Keanu Reeves Dennis Hopper Sandra Bullock Joe Morton Jeff Daniels
overview: Tensions run high when a crazed bomber rigs a Los Angeles bus with a device that will kill everyone on board if the vehicle's speed dips below fifty miles per hour.

title: Speechless (1994)
cast: Michael Keaton Geena Davis Bonnie Bedelia Christopher Reeve Ernie Hudson
overview: In the midst of election season in New Mexico, political speechwriters Julia Mann and Kevin Vallick begin a romance, unaware they are working for candidates on opposite sides.

title: Timecop (1994)
cast: Jean-Claude Van Damme Mia Sara Ron Silver Bruce McGill Gloria Reuben
overview: In 2004, an officer for a security agency that regulates time travel must fend for his life against a shady politician who has a tie to his past.

title: True Lies (1994)
cast: Arnold Schwarzenegger Jamie Lee Curtis Tom Arnold Bill Paxton Tia Carrere
overview: A fearless, globe-trotting, terrorist-battling secret agent has his life turned upside down when he discovers his wife might be having an affair with a used car salesman while terrorists smuggle nuclear war heads into the United States.

title: When a Man Loves a Woman (1994)
cast: Andy Garcia Meg Ryan Tina Majorino Philip Seymour Hoffman Mae Whitman
overview: An airline pilot and his wife are forced to face the consequences of her alcoholism when her addictions threaten her life and their daughter's safety. While the woman enters detox, her husband must face the truth of his enabling behavior.

title: Wolf (1994)
cast: Jack Nicholson Michelle Pfeiffer James Spader Kate Nelligan Richard Jenkins
overview: An aging publisher becomes a demon wolf and, with this newfound youthful vigor, fights to keep his job.

title: Wyatt Earp (1994)
cast: Kevin Costner Dennis Quaid Gene Hackman David Andrews Linden Ashby
overview: From Wichita to Dodge City, to the O.K. Corral in Tombstone, Wyatt Earp is taught that nothing matters more than family and the law. Joined by his brothers and Doc Holliday, Earp wages war on the dreaded Clanton and McLaury gangs.

title: Bad Company (1995)
cast: Laurence Fishburne Ellen Barkin Frank Langella Michael Beach David Ogden Stiers
overview: CIA operative Nelson Crowe is tasked with a deadly assignment: infiltrate a highly secret industrial espionage firm. Once inside, he teams with Margaret Wells, a master spy and seductive manipulator, in a plot to overthrow the organization's sinister president, which leads them into a darkly mysterious web of intrigue -- and shocking murder!

title: Man of No Importance, A (1994)
cast: Albert Finney Brenda Fricker Michael Gambon Tara Fitzgerald Rufus Sewell
overview: Alfie Byrne is a middle-aged bus conductor in Dublin in 1963. He would appear to live a life of quiet desperation: he's gay, but firmly closeted, and his sister is always trying to find him "the right girl". His passion is Oscar Wilde, his hobby is putting on amateur theatre productions in the local church hall. We follow him as he struggles with temptation, friendship, disapproval, and the conservative yet oddly lyrical world of Ireland in the early 1960s.

title: S.F.W. (1994)
cast: Stephen Dorff Reese Witherspoon Jake Busey Joey Lauren Adams Pamela Gidley
overview: An alienated and misanthropic teenager gains sudden and unwanted celebrity status after he's taken hostage by terrorists where his indifference to their threats to kill him makes news headlines.

title: Low Down Dirty Shame, A (1994)
cast: Keenen Ivory Wayans Charles S. Dutton Jada Pinkett Smith Salli Richardson-Whitfield Andrew Divoff
overview: A black detective becomes embroiled in a web of danger while searching for a fortune in missing drug money. During the course of his investigation, he encounters various old connections, ultimately confronting the criminal responsible for Shame's expulsion from the force. He must also deal with two women, Angela, a beautiful old flame, and Peaches, his energetic but annoying sidekick.

title: Colonel Chabert, Le (1994)
cast: Gérard Depardieu Fanny Ardant Fabrice Luchini André Dussollier Éric Elmosnino
overview: When Colonel Chabert returns from the war, he discovers that he has lost everything.

title: Faster Pussycat! Kill! Kill! (1965)
cast: Tura Satana Haji Lori Williams Sue Bernard Stuart Lancaster
overview: A trio of thrill-seeking go-go dancers kidnap a young girl and attempt to seduce an old rancher and his two sons out of their small fortune, but their scheme doesn't play out as intended.

title: Jason's Lyric (1994)
cast: Allen Payne Jada Pinkett Smith Bokeem Woodbine Eddie Griffin Suzzanne Douglas
overview: The story of a young man who must confront his own fears about love as well as his relationships with family and friends.

title: Street Fighter (1994)
cast: Jean-Claude Van Damme Raúl Juliá Kylie Minogue Byron Mann Damian Chapa
overview: Colonel Guile and various other martial arts heroes fight against the tyranny of dictator M. Bison and his cohorts.

title: In the Mouth of Madness (1995)
cast: Sam Neill Julie Carmen Jürgen Prochnow David Warner John Glover
overview: An insurance investigator visits a small town while looking into the strange disappearance of a popular horror novelist. He soon finds that the impact of the author’s books is far more than inspirational.

title: 8 Seconds (1994)
cast: Luke Perry Stephen Baldwin Red Mitchell Cynthia Geary James Rebhorn
overview: This film chronicles the life of Lane Frost, 1987 PRCA Bull Riding World Champion, his marriage and his friendships with Tuff Hedeman (three-time World Champion) and Cody Lambert.

title: Above the Rim (1994)
cast: Duane Martin Tupac Shakur Bernie Mac Marlon Wayans Leon
overview: Story of a promising high school basketball star and his relationships with two brothers, one a drug dealer and the other a former basketball star fallen on hard times and now employed as a security guard.

title: Addams Family Values (1993)
cast: Anjelica Huston Raúl Juliá Christopher Lloyd Joan Cusack Christina Ricci
overview: Siblings Wednesday and Pugsley Addams will stop at nothing to get rid of Pubert, the new baby boy adored by parents Gomez and Morticia. Things go from bad to worse when the new "black widow" nanny, Debbie Jellinsky, launches her plan to add Fester to her collection of dead husbands.

title: Age of Innocence, The (1993)
cast: Daniel Day-Lewis Michelle Pfeiffer Winona Ryder Alexis Smith Geraldine Chaplin
overview: In 19th century New York high society, a young lawyer falls in love with a woman separated from her husband, while he is engaged to the woman's cousin.

title: Airheads (1994)
cast: Brendan Fraser Steve Buscemi Adam Sandler Joe Mantegna Chris Farley
overview: The Lone Rangers have heavy-metal dreams and a single demo tape they can't get anyone to play. The solution: Hijack an FM rock radio station and hold the deejays hostage until they agree to broadcast the band's tape.

title: Air Up There, The (1994)
cast: Kevin Bacon Charles Gitonga Maina Yolanda Vazquez Mabutho 'Kid' Sithole Sean McCann
overview: Jimmy Dolan is a college basketball coach who wants a big promotion. To get it, he needs to make a dramatic find. He ends up deep in Africa, hoping to recruit Saleh, a huge basketball prodigy Jimmy glimpsed in a home movie. But Saleh is the chief's son and has responsibilities at home, since the tribe's land is threatened by a mining company with its own hotshot basketball team.

title: Another Stakeout (1993)
cast: Richard Dreyfuss Emilio Estevez Rosie O'Donnell Dennis Farina Miguel Ferrer
overview: A pair of immature detectives are joined by a pesky assistant district attorney in staking out a lakeside home where an important Mafia trial witness is believed to be heading.

title: Bad Girls (1994)
cast: Madeleine Stowe Mary Stuart Masterson Andie MacDowell Drew Barrymore James Russo
overview: Four former harlots try to leave the wild west (Colorado, to be exact) and head north to make a better life for themselves. Unfortunately someone from Cody's past won't let it happen that easily.

title: Barcelona (1994)

He receives an unexpected visit from his cousin Fred, a naval officer who has come to Spain on a public relations mission for a U.S. fleet. Not exactly friends in the past, Ted and Fred strike up relationships with women in the Spanish city and experience conflicts -- Ted with his employer, and Fred with the Barcelona community.

title: Beverly Hillbillies, The (1993)

overview: Mild-mannered dirt-poor hill-dweller Jed Clampett strikes it rich when oil is discovered on his property. At cousin Pearl's insistence, he moves his family to Beverly Hills to better enjoy his newfound wealth.

title: Beverly Hills Cop III (1994)
cast: Eddie Murphy Judge Reinhold Héctor Elizondo Timothy Carhart John Saxon
overview: When his boss is killed, Detroit cop Axel Foley finds evidence that the murderer had ties to a California amusement park called Wonder World. Returning to sunny Beverly Hills once more, Foley reunites with Detective Billy Rosewood to solve the case. Along with Billy's new partner, Detective Jon Flint, they discover that Wonder World is being used as a front for a massive counterfeiting ring.

title: Black Beauty (1994)
cast: Alan Cumming Docs Keepin Time Sean Bean David Thewlis Jim Carter
overview: The fates of horses, and the people who own and command them, are revealed as Black Beauty narrates the circle of his life.

title: Blink (1994)

overview: Emma is an attractive girl in her 20s who has been blind for 20 years. A new type of eye operation partially restores her sight, but she is having problems: sometimes she doesn't "remember" what she's seen until later. One night she is awakened by a commotion upstairs. Peering out of her door, she sees a shadowy figure descending the stairs. Convinced that her neighbour has been murdered she approaches the police, only to find that she is unsure if it was just her new eyes playing tricks on her.

title: Blown Away (1994)

overview: Blown Away tells the story of Jimmy Dove, who works for the Boston bomb squad. Shortly after Dove leaves the force, his partner is killed by a bomb that Dove thinks might have been made by someone he knows.

title: Blue Chips (1994)

She is voluptuous and volatile, wreaking havoc in his personal life and stirring up intrigue at each new Army base.

title: Body Snatchers (1993)

When people at the base begin acting strangely, Marti becomes convinced that they are slowly being replaced by plant-like aliens.

title: Boxing Helena (1993)
cast: Julian Sands Sherilyn Fenn Bill Paxton Art Garfunkel Betsy Clark
overview: A top surgeon is besotted with a beautiful woman who once rebuffed him. Unable to come to terms with life without her, he tries to convince her that they need each other. She has other ideas, but a horrific accident leaves her at his mercy.

title: Bronx Tale, A (1993)
cast: Robert De Niro Chazz Palminteri Lillo Brancato Francis Capra Taral Hicks
overview: Set in the Bronx during the tumultuous 1960s, an adolescent boy is torn between his honest, working-class father and a violent yet charismatic crime boss. Complicating matters is the youngster's growing attraction - forbidden in his neighborhood - for a beautiful black girl.

title: Cabin Boy (1994)
cast: Chris Elliott Ritch Brinkley James Gammon Brian Doyle-Murray Brion James
overview: A foul-mouthed finishing school graduate mistakenly winds up on an ill-fated fishing boat, and faces the wrath of a crew that considers him bad luck.

title: Calendar Girl (1993)
cast: Gabriel Olds Jason Priestley Jerry O'Connell Joe Pantoliano Steve Railsback
overview: Three young men go on an end of the summer trip to Hollywood, California. Their quest: to fulfill the fantasy of meeting Marilyn Monroe.

title: Carlito's Way (1993)
cast: Al Pacino Sean Penn Penelope Ann Miller John Leguizamo Ingrid Rogers
overview: Free after years in prison, Carlito Brigante intends to give up his criminal ways, but it's not long before the ex-con is sucked back into the New York City underworld.

title: City Slickers II: The Legend of Curly's Gold (1994)
cast: Billy Crystal Daniel Stern Jon Lovitz Jack Palance Patricia Wettig
overview: Mitch Robbins' 40th birthday begins quite well until he returns home and finds his brother Glen, the black sheep of the family, in his sofa. Nevertheless he is about to have a wonderful birthday-night with his wife when he discovers a treasure map of Curly by chance. Together with Phil and unfortunately Glen he tries to find the hidden gold of Curly's father in the desert of Arizona.

title: Clean Slate (1994)
cast: Dana Carvey Valeria Golino James Earl Jones Kevin Pollak Michael Gambon
overview: Pogue is a private eye with a problem: every morning when he wakes up, he has total amnesia, waking up with a 'blank slate'. Since he is in the middle of a hot investigation and has a developing romance, this is less than convenient.

title: Cliffhanger (1993)

title: Coneheads (1993)

With enormous cone-shaped heads, robotlike walks and an appetite for toilet paper, aliens Beldar and Prymatt don't exactly blend in with the population of Paramus, N.J. But for some reason, everyone believes them when they say they're from France.

title: Color of Night (1994)
cast: Bruce Willis Jane March Rubén Blades Lesley Ann Warren Scott Bakula
overview: A color-blind psychiatrist is stalked by an unknown killer after taking over his murdered friend's therapy group and becomes embroiled in an intense affair with a mysterious woman who may be connected to the crime.

title: Cops and Robbersons (1994)
cast: Chevy Chase Jack Palance Dianne Wiest Robert Davi David Barry Gray
overview: When the police discover that a mob hitman has moved in next door to the Robbersons, they set up a stakeout in the Robbersons' home. Hard-nosed, tough-as-nails Jake Stone and his young partner Tony Moore are assigned to the stakeout, but now it is a question of whether Jake can last long enough to capture the bad guys. The Robbersons want to help, and by doing so, drive Jake crazy.

title: Cowboy Way, The (1994)
cast: Woody Harrelson Kiefer Sutherland Dylan McDermott Ernie Hudson Marg Helgenberger
overview: Two championship rodeo partners travel to New York to find their missing friend, Nacho Salazar who went missing there.

title: Dave (1993)
cast: Kevin Kline Sigourney Weaver Frank Langella Kevin Dunn Ving Rhames
overview: A sweet-natured Temp Agency operator and amateur Presidential look-alike is recruited by the Secret Service to become a temporary stand-in for the President of the United States.

title: Dazed and Confused (1993)
cast: Jason London Matthew McConaughey Joey Lauren Adams Rory Cochrane Wiley Wiggins
overview: The adventures of a group of Texas teens on their last day of school in 1976, centering on student Randall Floyd, who moves easily among stoners, jocks and geeks. Floyd is a star athlete, but he also likes smoking weed, which presents a conundrum when his football coach demands he sign a "no drugs" pledge.

title: Demolition Man (1993)

title: Even Cowgirls Get the Blues (1993)

title: Farewell My Concubine (Ba wang bie ji) (1993)

title: With Honors (1994)

overview: Convinced he'll graduate with honors because of his thesis paper, a stuffy Harvard student finds his paper being held hostage by a homeless man, who might be the guy to school the young man in life.

overview: Haunted by memories of his father murdering a family, Arlis Sweeney prefers to keep to himself, focusing his energy on his work. One day, the traumatic past that eats away at him returns when he meets Kay Davies, a woman connected to the bloody event. Against all odds, Arlis and Kay fall in love; however, when his father, Roy, reappears in his life -- with the coldhearted Ginnie in tow -- Arlis must deal with his past demons.

title: Widows' Peak (1994)
cast: Mia Farrow Joan Plowright Natasha Richardson Adrian Dunbar Jim Broadbent
overview: Scandal and mystery reign following the arrival of Edwina in a small Irish town populated entirely by widows. Edwina quickly falls out with the locals while also falling in with the son of the community's leader

Despite his own attraction to Andy, Doug tries to stay focused on getting Christian to invest $3 million in his project.

The FBI contact him, asking him for information and suddenly his life is ruined. He has a choice - work with the FBI, or stay with the Firm. Either way he will lose his life as he knows it. Mitch figures the only way out is to follow his own plan...

However, greedy park owner Dial soon catches wind of the duo and makes plans to profit from them.

title: Fresh (1994)
cast: Sean Nelson Giancarlo Esposito Samuel L. Jackson N'Bushe Wright Ron Brice
overview: Death and violence anger twelve year old drug courier Fresh, who sets his rival employers against each other.

title: Fugitive, The (1993)

overview: Wrongfully convicted of murdering his wife and sentenced to death, Richard Kimble escapes from the law in an attempt to find the real killer and clear his name.

title: Geronimo: An American Legend (1993)

overview: The Apache Indians have reluctantly agreed to settle on a US Government approved reservation. Not all the Apaches are able to adapt to the life of corn farmers. One in particular, Geronimo, is restless. Pushed over the edge by broken promises and necessary actions by the government, Geronimo and thirty or so other warriors form an attack team which humiliates the government by evading capture, while reclaiming what is rightfully theirs.

title: Getaway, The (1994)
cast: Alec Baldwin Kim Basinger Michael Madsen James Woods David Morse
overview: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

title: Getting Even with Dad (1994)

overview: Con man Ray is going after one last heist – a stash of rare coins – when his estranged son Timmy unexpectedly shows up. overview: Max is a trendy, pretty, young lesbian, who is having trouble finding love. A friend sets her up with Ely, whom Max likes, but Ely is frumpy, homely, and older. Nor do they have much in common. Can Max learn to look past the packaging?

title: Hard Target (1993)

overview: When a woman's father goes missing, she enlists a local to aid in her search.  The pair soon discover that her father has died at the hands of a wealthy sportsman who hunts homeless men as a form of recreation.

title: Hot Shots! Part Deux (1993)

overview: Topper Harley is found to be working as an odd-job-man in a monastery. The CIA want him to lead a rescue mission into Iraq, to rescue the last rescue team, who went in to rescue the last rescue team—who went in to rescue hostages left behind after Desert Storm.

title: Live Nude Girls (1995)
cast: Dana Delany Kim Cattrall Cynthia Stevenson Laila Robins Lora Zane
overview: A group of old friends at a Hens Night discuss their issues, uncertainties, fears and fantasies.

title: Englishman Who Went Up a Hill But Came Down a Mountain, The (1995)
cast: Hugh Grant Tara Fitzgerald Colm Meaney Ian McNeice Ian Hart
overview: When an English cartographer arrives in Wales to tell the residents of the Welsh village of Ffynnon Garw  that their 'mountain' is only a hill, the offended community sets out to remedy the situation.

title: House of the Spirits, The (1993)
cast: Meryl Streep Glenn Close Jeremy Irons Winona Ryder Antonio Banderas
overview: A rancher, his clairvoyant wife and their family face turbulent years in South America.

title: House Party 3 (1994)
cast: Christopher Reid Christopher Martin Angela Means Khandi Alexander Bernie Mac
overview: Hip Hop duo Kid & Play return in the second follow-up to their 1990 screen debut House Party. Kid (Christopher "Kid" Reid) is taking the plunge and marrying his girlfriend Veda (Angela Means), while his friend Play (Christopher Martin) is dipping his toes into the music business, managing a roughneck female rap act called Sex as a Weapon. Play books the ladies for a concert with heavy-hitting pr

title: Hudsucker Proxy, The (1994)
cast: Tim Robbins Jennifer Jason Leigh Paul Newman Charles Durning Jim True-Frost
overview: A naive business graduate is installed as president of a manufacturing company as part of a stock scam.

title: Home Again
cast: Reese Witherspoon Nat Wolff Jon Rudnitsky Pico Alexander Lake Bell
overview: Life for a single mom in Los Angeles takes an unexpected turn when she allows three young guys to move in with her.

title: 11-Sep
cast: Ernest Borgnine Maryam Karimi Emmanuelle Laborit Jérôme Horry Keren Mor
overview: An anthology of short films inspired by the events of the September 11 World Trade Center attacks.

title: The Good Catholic
cast: Zachary Spicer Wrenn Schmidt John C. McGinley Danny Glover Alessandro Miro
overview: An idealistic young priest is dedicated to his calling until he meets a woman at confession. After the meeting, he seeks guidance from his fellow priests.

title: Gun Shy
cast: Liam Neeson Oliver Platt Sandra Bullock José Zúñiga Richard Schiff
overview: Legendary undercover DEA agent Charlie Mayough has suddenly lost his nerves of steel. On the verge of a career-induced mental breakdown, and in complete fear of trigger-happy Mafia leader Fulvio Nesstra, Charlie seeks psychiatric help and finds himself relying on the support of an unstable therapy group and nurse Judy just to get through his work.

When he accompanies his musical prodigy son on a university tour, he can't help comparing his life with those of his four best college friends who seemingly have more wealthy and glamorous lives. But when circumstances force him to reconnect with his former friends, Brad begins to question whether he has really failed or if their lives are actually more flawed than they appear.

title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
cast: Taron Egerton Colin Firth Julianne Moore Mark Strong Hanna Alström
overview: When an attack on the Kingsman headquarters takes place and a new villain rises, Eggsy and Merlin are forced to work together with the American agency known as the Statesman to save the world.

overview: Six young ninjas are tasked with defending their island home of Ninjago. By night, they’re gifted warriors using their skill and awesome fleet of vehicles to fight villains and monsters. By day, they’re ordinary teens struggling against their greatest enemy....high school.
